manifest.name: face-synth
manifest.author: DreamLayer Team
manifest.description: Your head is the MIDI controller. Tilt to pick the note, tap to play it, and how hard you move is how hard it hits. Get a few people on the mesh and you're a band.
manifest.forwho: For musicians, performers, and anyone who wants to play the world.
long: No controller, no hands, no cables. Where you look is the note, and how hard you move is how hard it hits.
You can't play a wrong note. Everything is locked to a scale, so every twitch of your head lands in key.
Everyone in a GhostMode circle is a separate voice in one band. The notes ride the mesh, so every rig hears the whole thing.
